name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.15.0 adds: build123d_discussions (GitHub issues + comment threads as de-facto forum, unioned into build123d_examples family); 0.14.1 base: mcp-server-gmsh-post (MSH v4.1 only — .vol via radia_export netgen for HO curved) + lint rule gmsh-v22-deprecated; cubit_exec_safely (auto-checkpoint + batch dry-run gate + silent-error detection).
author: Kengo Sugahara
